summary: Plan-only remediation classification for five hydrated open PR candidates. No merge is recommended because every PR lacks a complete merge preflight and each affected candidate has failing real-behavior proof, draft/broad status, unresolved review-bot findings, or branch freshness blockers. One narrow repair path is planned for #59816 with contributor credit preserved.

actions.reason: Keep open as related active work, but do not merge or repair from this shard: the diff is broad and still needs proof/review resolution before any finalization path is safe.

Standalone Gmail hook regression PR should stay open, but this inventory shard should not merge it while proof and node-core checks are failing.

A bounded repair is executable: update the contributor branch against current main, make the regression test hit the allowBots-only drop path, strengthen assertions, and rerun targeted Discord validation.

Draft maintainer-owned broad refactor should remain with the author; it is not a merge, close, or automated repair candidate in this inventory shard.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #59816 so Discord bot messages dropped under allowBots="mentions" record a pending history entry and the regression test actually exercises that branch. Keep the patch on the existing contributor branch when possible, preserve author credit, and revalidate against current main.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(discord): preserve dropped bot message history
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair source PR #59816 so Discord bot messages dropped by allowBots="mentions" still record a pending channel-history entry.
- Update the regression test to configure the mention-only bot policy path and assert the exact recorded message entry.
- Rebase/refresh against current main so Dependency Guard and changed checks can run cleanly.

## Credit
Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/59816
Credit to @Hou-Yufan / Timmy for the original fix direction and test coverage.

## Validation
- pnpm -s vitest run extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.preflight.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for #59816 by @Hou-Yufan; commit author shown in artifact as Timmy.
Replacement or repair PR body must mention the original PR URL https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/59816 and state that attribution is carried forward.
